query: SELECT id, property_id, room_number, floor, zone, room_type, template_id, status FROM peppr_rooms WHERE property_id IN ('7bb45879-4a59-4d4c-9', '3d968c10-8f30-4b39-a') ORDER BY room_number LIMIT 10;
